description: Single source of truth for CallLint public-facing facts. Website, README, agent-readable docs, and the public-copy guard all read from this file. Update here first, then run `pnpm check:public-copy`.

headlines.eyebrow: Pre-flight risk linting for agent tools
headlines.headline: Before your agent acts, check the blast radius.
headlines.subheadline: CallLint statically scans MCP and agent-tool configs before they run, showing what each tool can read, write, execute, connect to, send, or mutate — with evidence-backed SAFE / REVIEW / BLOCK / UNKNOWN verdicts.
headlines.trustLine: Offline by default. Deterministic. Never executes the server it judges. SAFE means no blockers observed, not guaranteed safe.
headlines.oneLiner: Pre-flight risk linting for MCP and agent tools — know the blast radius before your agent runs them.

requiredPhrases: Not a proof of runtime safety
Never executes the server it judges
